'''âs-ng-ch-y''' ('''kasangcheyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:expatriate|expatriate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-ng-ch-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:expatriate|expatriate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-ng-ch-y
|-
! Lemma
| kasangcheyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisangcheyoko|thisangcheyoko]] || [[word:jisangcheyoko|jisangcheyoko]] || [[word:shisangcheyoko|shisangcheyoko]] || [[word:kisangcheyoko|kisangcheyoko]]
|-

|-
